assertions.assertion: Response explains that SameSite=Strict prevents the cookie from being set during the OIDC callback redirect from IdentityServer
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pitfall #5 explains 'Redirect Loop After Login' caused by SameSite restrictions

assertions.assertion: Response recommends changing SameSiteMode.Strict to SameSiteMode.Lax for the authentication cookie
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pitfall #5 shows `options.Cookie.SameSite = SameSiteMode.Lax; // Not Strict for OIDC callbacks`

assertions.assertion: Response includes code setting options.Cookie.SameSite = SameSiteMode.Lax on the cookie handler
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pitfall #5 shows exact code: `options.Cookie.SameSite = SameSiteMode.Lax;`

assertions.assertion: Response mentions setting Cookie.SecurePolicy to Always for HTTPS
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pitfall #5 shows `options.Cookie.SecurePolicy = CookieSecurePolicy.Always;` in the same code block
